capabilities.core_runtime_path: ingest-link with real public HTTP fetch, verify-external-claims, validate-generic-web-url-ingestion, validate-knowledge-verification, provider-live-smoke official_openai
capabilities.accepted_surface: Live public source fetch, source trace, evidence map, claim verification, freshness/contradiction evidence, and accepted Provider Runtime opt-in boundary.
capabilities.degraded_surface: If network opt-in or public source access is unavailable, local/manual evidence verification remains available with explicit degraded status.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Remove external verification source files or disable live external network opt-in; local KB workflows continue.

capabilities.core_runtime_path: preflight-documents, batch-import-documents, parse-with-backend --backend builtin, smoke-paddleocr-backend, run-paddleocr-ocr, parser-backend-inspect paddleocr
capabilities.accepted_surface: Builtin parser, document preflight, batch import, chunking, parser quality, and real PaddleOCR image OCR runtime invocation.
capabilities.degraded_surface: If optional PaddleOCR dependency or model cache is removed, backend=builtin remains available and OCR-required files become review-required.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Disable or uninstall parser-paddleocr and use backend=builtin; unsupported/OCR-required files remain review-required.

capabilities.core_runtime_path: quality-gate, parse-quality-gate, evidence-gate, eval-retrieval, verify-claims, check-knowledge-accuracy
capabilities.accepted_surface: Local deterministic quality, evidence, retrieval, claim verification, contradiction, freshness, and review-required signaling.
capabilities.degraded_surface: Low confidence or conflicting evidence remains review-required instead of silently passing.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Disable external verification sources; local quality gate still runs on package evidence.

capabilities.accepted_surface: Markdown, DOCX, PDF, and PPTX artifacts plus generation trace, quality report, and export validation report.
capabilities.degraded_surface: Export validation failures remain visible with retry guidance; no release publishing is implied.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Disable a requested output format and continue with other local formats.

capabilities.accepted_surface: Skill package generation, validation, installability, privacy boundary, KB/Agent compatibility, and governance report.
capabilities.degraded_surface: Untrusted KB input remains explicitly gated or requires allow-untrusted evidence.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Keep advanced composition display-only while generated Skill package and governance report remain usable.

capabilities.accepted_surface: Agent Creation Package files, manifest, KB/Skill bindings, compat check, safety boundary, role, soul, and system prompt.
capabilities.degraded_surface: Agent CRUD, save/version management, Agent Runtime, Memory, Collaboration, and A2A remain omitted.
capabilities.rollback_disable_switch: Export package draft only; do not expose Agent runtime execution or version save.
